metal_notes: timing_backends=agx_type_surface|agx_metal_dep_chain; genuine half dep-chain probes measured (2026-04-02): fp16x2_dd_genuine=6.229ms/dispatch (1.82× baseline); fp16x4_genuine=17.105ms/dispatch (4.99× baseline); AGX widens half→float internally — fp16x2 1.17× MORE expensive than float32x2 DD genuine

cpu_notes: timing_backends=apple_cpu_reference

neural_notes: timing_backends=mlx_gpu|pytorch_cpu|pytorch_mps
next_action: Metal AGX FP32 arithmetic latencies fully characterized (2026-04-02): fadd=1.695ns fmul=1.347ns fma=1.993ns; ranking fmul < fadd < fma for serial dep chains. DS-mul step latency = 2.072 ns ≈ 1 FMA (FMA-bottlenecked
column14: fmul/fadd overlapped). Veltkamp DS-multiply is optimal wide-precision base on AGX.
